questions.question: What is manufacturing?
questions.explanation: Manufacturing is the process of producing goods in large quantities from raw materials.

questions.question: Which sector includes manufacturing activities?
questions.explanation: Manufacturing industries belong to the secondary sector of the economy.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of manufacturing?
questions.explanation: Paper is produced by processing wood in factories.

questions.question: Manufacturing industries help to modernise which sector?
questions.explanation: Industries provide tools and equipment that help improve agricultural productivity.

questions.question: Which industry uses agricultural raw materials?
questions.explanation: Agro-based industries depend on agricultural products like cotton and sugarcane.

questions.question: Which of the following is a mineral-based industry?
questions.explanation: Iron and steel industries depend on minerals such as iron ore.

questions.question: Which industry produces cloth from cotton?
questions.explanation: The textile industry produces fabrics from cotton and other fibres.

questions.question: Which raw material is used in the aluminium industry?
questions.explanation: Bauxite is the main raw material used in aluminium production.

questions.question: Which industry is known as a basic industry?
questions.explanation: Iron and steel industry provides raw materials for many other industries.

questions.question: Which industry is based on sugarcane?
questions.explanation: Sugar industry uses sugarcane as its raw material.

questions.question: Which fibre is known as the 'Golden Fibre'?
questions.explanation: Jute is popularly known as the Golden Fibre.

questions.question: Which city is known as the electronic capital of India?
questions.explanation: Bengaluru is the major centre for electronics and IT industries.

questions.question: Which industry produces cement used in construction?
questions.explanation: The cement industry produces materials used in construction.

questions.question: Which pollution is caused by factory machines and generators?
questions.explanation: Noise pollution is caused by loud machinery and industrial activities.

questions.question: Which type of pollution occurs when industries release harmful gases?
questions.explanation: Industrial gases such as sulphur dioxide cause air pollution.

questions.question: Which type of industry produces vehicles like cars and buses?
questions.explanation: Automobile industries manufacture vehicles.

questions.question: Which type of pollution occurs when industrial waste enters rivers?
questions.explanation: Industrial waste and chemicals contaminate water bodies.

questions.question: Which organisation in India focuses on power generation and environmental management?
questions.explanation: NTPC is a major power generation corporation in India.

questions.question: Which industry produces fertilizers?
questions.explanation: Fertilizers are produced by the chemical industry.

questions.question: Which raw material is used in the iron and steel industry?
questions.explanation: Iron ore is the main raw material for steel production.

questions.question: Which state has many jute mills along the Hugli River?
questions.explanation: Most jute mills are located in West Bengal.

questions.question: Which industry provides raw materials to many other industries?
questions.explanation: Basic industries supply raw materials to other industries.

questions.question: Which industry produces medicines and plastics?
questions.explanation: Chemical industries produce plastics, medicines and fertilizers.

questions.question: Which industry produces electronic goods like televisions and computers?
questions.explanation: The electronics industry manufactures devices like computers and televisions.

questions.question: Which factor is important for the location of aluminium industries?
questions.explanation: Aluminium smelting requires large amounts of electricity.
